secciones.contenido: We're A Team Of Passionate Dental Experts Dedicated To Ensuring Your Smile Is Healthy & Sparkling

imagenes.descripcion: Imagen de fondo del hero - consultorio dental profesional

secciones.contenido:
Quality dental care is a fundamental human right. We believe everyone deserves to receive dental care in a safe environment that reflects the diversity of the world we live in today. Our mission is to bring affordable, accessible care to hardworking, everyday people of all sizes, colors, and backgrounds. Stop by our office or contact us to see how we can brighten your smile.

Nosotros hablamos español

imagenes.descripcion: Foto del equipo o consultorio dental

secciones.contenido: "I have always been nervous about going to the dentist, but after going to Precision Dental, that has changed. Everyone was so kind and very easy to talk to and explained everything they were doing. A great group and I plan to keep up with my dental visits now that I've been there." – Nancy N., From Google Reviewer. Rated 4.8/5 on Google.

Cosmetic Dentistry
Family Dentistry
Reconstructive Dentistry

secciones.titulo: You No Longer Have To Go To The Dentist… Now, You Get To Go.
secciones.contenido: When you walk through our doors, you'll feel something different than other dentist offices you may have been to. Apart from being warmly welcomed into a comfortable, clean and professional environment, you'll sense a sort of buzz in the air, the kinda vibe that only exudes from a place that is thriving. And why is that? Because at Precision Dental, we're a group of people deeply passionate about teeth. Well, clean and healthy teeth, to be more exact. The point is, we truly find Joy in our work, which is what motivates us to come in each and every day and give 100%, using the most sophisticated techniques and up-to-date technology, to ensure that you receive the dental care you deserve.

imagenes.descripcion: Interior del consultorio dental mostrando ambiente profesional

secciones.titulo: 5 Quick Tips To Brighten Your Smile
secciones.contenido:
We want to empower you to make wise decisions for your oral health through individual consultations and patient education. A well-informed patient will be able to take an active role in their treatment and together we can accomplish a great smile!

1. Brush Twice A Day For At Least Two Minutes
2. Floss At Least Once Per Day
3. Go To The Dentist At Least Twice A Year
4. Eat Right. Diet Goes Along Way In Dental Care
5. Drink Water. Staying Hydrated Is Essential

We dream of a day when every Dentist will have a diverse team, accept a diverse clientele, and be willing to see those patients that are often rejected. We dream of becoming a nationally recognized Black-owned dental practice known for welcoming underrepresented communities and removing barriers to multilingual care.
Our mission is to create spaces to encourage diversity and welcome an ever-changing society. We position ourselves as approachable practitioners committed to reducing dental anxiety.

imagenes.descripcion: Logo gris como marca de agua decorativa

secciones.contenido:
Diversity — Respect and embrace diversity in employment
Integrity — Always be honest with others and yourself
Teamwork — Learn from your team to be stronger together
Empowerment — Take initiative, give your best, and treat challenges as opportunities
Commitment — Obtain continuing education, implement new technology

secciones.titulo: About Dr. Tywana M Groce, DMD
secciones.contenido: Dr. Groce pursued dentistry after learning only 3% of dentists are people of color. She completed her education at Hampton University and her DDS at Temple University School of Dentistry. She spent 3 years in public health before establishing private practice in the Upstate South Carolina area, where she has practiced for nearly 15 years.

imagenes.descripcion: Foto profesional de Dr. Tywana M Groce, DMD - fundadora y dentista principal
Foto del equipo dental en el consultorio

secciones.contenido:
Our practice features a full range of affordable dental services to care for your smile.

Main Services:
- Teeth Whitening
- Dentures & Partials
- Custom Porcelain Veneers
- Crowns
- Dental Bonding
- Dental Implants

Additional Services:
- Inlays and Onlays
- Fixed bridges
- Tooth-Colored Fillings
- Invisible Braces
- Routine Dental Cleanings & Exams
- Digital X Rays
- Fluoride Treatments
- Sealants
- Night guards
- Root Canals
- Non-Surgical Periodontal Therapy
- Tooth Removal
- Sedation

The practice emphasizes ongoing evolution with dental advancements. They highlight CEREC technology — Chairside Economical Restoration of Esthetic Ceramic — which uses digital modeling and CAD/CAM dentistry to create affordable ceramic restorations for tooth damage from decay or injury.
